title: 31Cal Arc Beanie
shortDescription: Double layer construction for insulation and warmth.. Pleated crown area for a snug fit on the head.. It is lightweight with a high cotton content which improves breathability.
description: Double layer construction for insulation and warmth.. Pleated crown area for a snug fit on the head.. It is lightweight with a high cotton content which improves breathability.

features: Double layer construction for insulation and warmth.
Pleated crown area for a snug fit on the head.
It is lightweight with a high cotton content which improves breathability.
Centre front with ATPV 31 cal/cm² embroidery for accessory suitability identification.
Dromex Arc sidewinder on the right hand side of beanie.
attributes.composition: Dromex® A.P.T™ 88/12 FR (flame retardant) interlock stretch fabric
